text:
先生、さすがです！
あの攻撃を回避しての一撃……！
自分、感動しています！

エネミーの大きさに、惑わされず
落ち着いて弱点を狙っていく！
勉強になります！　押忍！

なかなか簡単には
できそうにありませんが……！
技術を磨いていこうと思います！

１日でも早く、先生のお力に
なれるように頑張っていきます！
ご指導ありがとうございま

That was great, Teach! You dodged the
attack like WHOOSH, and timed your
attack like WHAM! You didn't just blow it
away, you blew ME away!

So I can't be intimidated by an enemy's size.
Just gotta keep cool and aim for their weak
point! See, I'm learning already! Heck yeah!

I know it's a long road ahead, but every step
matters! And I took a big step forward today!

I'm gonna work hard so that one day I'm
walking right alongside you. Thanks for
helpin' me get there, Teach.
